indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Rows of chairs facing a wall make it difficult to set up a computer workstation without rearranging the seating.

indicators.name: lack of flat work surface
indicators.rationale: No flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient and not task-specific, which is inadequate for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The rows of chairs facing a wall make it difficult to set up a computer workstation without rearranging the seating, and there is no flat work surface at sitting height. The lighting appears to be ambient and not task-specific, which is inadequate for computer work.
